actors.dialogue: Camp Randall is home. The Team Building is west across the quad.
The stadium axis connects every place the team needs.
The team bus is ready for the airport.
Captain: Take the championship through the stadium tunnel.

events.label: Memory garden
events.text: Memory Garden: every path back to the stadium carries a Badger story.

actors.dialogue: Rex: One more wrestle-off. No excuses.
A singlet turns a prospect into a recruit.
Every route teaches a different position.
The Field House is just ahead.
The shipment is inside. Coach wants your roster ready.
The Field House rewards wrestlers who pressure first.
Bucky's Locker Room has the gear counter.
The Trainer's Room restores Condition and Stamina.
Open mats are where overlooked wrestlers get noticed.
Some recruits only appear off the main trail.
Picnic Point is west along the shore.

events.label: Locked boathouse
events.text: The Lakeshore Boathouse is locked for the season. A faded team schedule hangs inside.

events.label: Mendota pier
events.text: Lake Mendota stretches past the end of the pier. The next test waits west.

events.label: Terrace chairs
events.text: Three bright chairs face the lake: cardinal, gold, and blue.

actors.dialogue: The Funk Doctor: Balance disappears when rhythm changes.
The fire circle marks the point. The trail back is east.
Win here and the Picnic Point credential is yours.

events.label: Fire circle
events.text: Generations of wrestlers have met at the end of the point. The stones still hold their marks.

actors.dialogue: Deion: Throws start with footwork, not force.
Own the center before you reach for the body lock.
The Capitol is east. Bascom Hill branches north.
Capitol Square begins beyond this block.

events.label: State Street
events.text: STATE STREET - The pedestrian mall runs east to Capitol Square.

events.label: Library Mall
events.text: LIBRARY MALL - Bascom Hill climbs north. Capitol Square is east.

events.label: State Street Theater
events.text: STATE STREET THEATER - Closed for the conference wrestling showcase.

events.label: The Capitol dome rises beyond the next block.

actors.dialogue: The Professor: Good wrestlers solve the position before they attack.
The statue remembers every climb.
This hill is optional. The lesson is not.

events.label: Lincoln Monument
events.text: A campus monument to persistence: climb with purpose, then finish what you started.

events.label: Bascom history
events.text: BASCOM HILL - The climb is part of the lesson.

actors.dialogue: The red-cross building is the Trainer's Room. It restores Condition and Stamina.
The singlet crest marks Bucky's Locker Room. Stock up before Monona.
The stone promenade loops around the Capitol gardens.
The Senator's staff handles team travel after the challenge.

events.label: Capitol Square
events.text: CAPITOL SQUARE - Follow the promenade east; the Capitol entrance faces the central axis.

events.label: Civic Offices
events.text: CIVIC OFFICES - Senator's staff issues team travel credentials after the Capitol challenge.

events.label: Capitol Hotel
events.text: CAPITOL HOTEL - Reserved for visiting teams and tournament officials.

events.label: Capitol directory
events.text: TRAINER'S ROOM: northwest. BUCKY'S LOCKER ROOM: southeast. MONONA SHORE: south.

events.label: Monona Shore
events.text: MONONA SHORE - Voucher holders proceed south.
